title: paeonia ostii subsp. lishizhenii
intro: Paeonia ostii subsp. lishizhenii, also known as Chinese peony, is a type of flowering plant native to China, belonging to the family Paeoniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Paeonia ostii subsp. lishizhenii include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in decoctions or infusions, or as a dried root, to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
